spec.title: Local key resolver and secret store

humanSummary.text: Initial audits found P1 blockers in local secret filesystem boundaries and prompt/external resolver modeling. Repair commits 294e62f and 72c4cca fixed those blockers. The focused re-audit found no remaining P0/P1 findings; P2/P3 follow-ups were recorded as KAIFUU-146 and KAIFUU-147.

findings.title: Local secret allow-prefix matching can over-authorize sibling ids
findings.description: The focused re-audit found that raw starts_with matching allows a prefix such as private/customer/account to also permit private/customer/accounting/key.

evidence.detail: Focused KAIFUU-050 re-audit after repair commit 84035345 verified P0/P1 blockers were gone but identified the segment-boundary policy gap.

findings.impact: A configured local-secret allow prefix can authorize unintended sibling secret ids inside the same store.
actionableAcceptanceCriteria: Allowed local-secret prefixes match exact ids or path-segment children only.
Sibling ids with the same raw string prefix are rejected with redacted policy diagnostics.

acceptanceCriteria: An allow prefix such as private/customer/account permits private/customer/account/key but rejects private/customer/accounting/key.
existingDagNodeUpdate.notes: Follow-up node inserted in the same branch as audit finding ingestion.

findings.title: Key resolver semantic error docs are stale
findings.description: The stable semantic error list does not include newly added resolver diagnostics for malformed secret refs, out-of-policy refs, unavailable external secrets, and cancelled prompts.

evidence.detail: Focused KAIFUU-050 re-audit compared runtime diagnostics against the key-discovery documentation.

findings.impact: Future adapter or helper work may miss the canonical reporting contract for key resolver errors.
actionableAcceptanceCriteria: New key resolver diagnostics are documented with redaction expectations.
Docs continue to distinguish interface hooks from implemented external backends.

acceptanceCriteria: kaifuu.malformed_secret_ref, kaifuu.secret_ref_out_of_policy, kaifuu.external_secret_unavailable, and kaifuu.prompt_cancelled are documented with redaction expectations.
existingDagNodeUpdate.notes: Follow-up node inserted in the same branch as audit finding ingestion.
